name: goal-plan
description: Prepare and govern reviewed long-horizon goals with append-only runtime validation and independent acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and govern long-running Codex goals.
interface.longDescription: Goal Plan prepares verifiable long-horizon plans, maintains append-only runtime and finding ledgers, builds independent reviewer prompts, validates lifecycle transitions, and requires reviewer-owned acceptance evidence before completion.
defaultPrompt: Use /goal-plan to prepare or govern a reviewed long-running implementation goal.
